specific_question: How many penetration tests did the cybersecurity specialist at MediConn conduct on the firm's virtual healthcare platform in Q1 2025?
answer: According to internal logs, the cybersecurity specialist conducted 7 penetration tests on the MediConn virtual healthcare platform between January 1 and March 31, 2025.
dr_question: By Q4 2025, how can MediConn Solutions integrate the HHS Cybersecurity Performance Goals (CPGs) into its virtual healthcare platform to ensure compliance for both internal systems and third-party vendors, while effectively mitigating emerging cyber threats?
